description: You are a ground data systems engineer responsible for processing automated command schedules where spacecraft uplink bandwidth is highly constrained. Process the raw command schedule at /home/ga/Desktop/raw_schedule.csv (headers: seq_id, target, command, type, duration) by applying a deduplication filter: a command is redundant and must be dropped if its 'target', 'command', 'type', and 'duration' values are exactly identical to the most recently kept command (contiguous duplicates). Execute the resulting optimized schedule exactly once against the live INST target in OpenC3 COSMOS (Password: Cosmos2024!). Save a JSON report to /home/ga/Desktop/optimized_schedule.json containing 'original_count' (integer), 'optimized_count' (integer), and 'optimized_sequence' (an array of objects, each containing the kept 'seq_id', 'target', 'command', 'type', and 'duration').
